sentences.target: Ich brauche ein paar Eier für morgen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊ̯xə aɪ̯n paːɐ̯ ˈaɪ̯ɐ fyːɐ ˈmɔʁɡn̩/

translations.de: Ich brauche ein paar Eier für morgen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊ̯xə aɪ̯n paːɐ̯ ˈaɪ̯ɐ fyːɐ ˈmɔʁɡn̩/
translations.en: I need a few eggs for tomorrow.
translations.fr: J’ai besoin de quelques œufs pour demain.
translations.it: Mi servono alcune uova per domani.
translations.ko: 내일 쓸 달걀 몇 개가 필요해요.
translations.ru: Мне нужно несколько яиц на завтра.
translations.pt: Preciso de alguns ovos para amanhã.
translations.vi: Tôi cần vài quả trứng cho ngày mai.
translations.nl: Ik heb een paar eieren nodig voor morgen.
translations.uk: Мені потрібно кілька яєць на завтра.
translations.hi: मुझे कल के लिए कुछ अंडे चाहिए.
translations.nb: Jeg trenger noen egg til i morgen.
translations.id: Saya butuh beberapa telur untuk besok.
translations.sv: Jag behöver några ägg till i morgon.
translations.ro: Am nevoie de câteva ouă pentru mâine.
translations.da: Jeg har brug for nogle æg til i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日、卵がいくつか必要です。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite main verb, present indicative (1st sg); governs a direct object and a temporal PP.
Indefinite article; part of the quantifying determiner phrase ‘ein paar’ modifying ‘Eier’.
Quantifying determiner; forms the fixed expression ‘ein paar’ meaning ‘a few’, modifying the noun.
Plural noun; accusative direct object of ‘brauche’ determined by ‘ein paar’.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a temporal PP specifying when.
Temporal noun used without article; object of the preposition ‘für’ indicating the time reference.

sentences.target: Wir haben ein paar Minuten Zeit.

translations.de: Wir haben ein paar Minuten Zeit.
translations.nl: We hebben nog een paar minuten.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite main verb, present indicative (1st/3rd pl form); takes a nominal object.
Indefinite article; part of the quantifying determiner phrase ‘ein paar’ modifying ‘Minuten’.
Quantifying determiner; forms ‘ein paar’, modifying the measure noun.
Plural measure noun; modifies ‘Zeit’ to express quantity/extent.
Singular noun; accusative direct object of ‘haben’ with the preceding measure phrase ‘ein paar Minuten’.

sentences.target: Ich schicke dir später ein paar Fotos.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈʃɪkə diːɐ aɪ̯n paːɐ̯ ˈfoːtoːs ˈʃpɛːtɐ/

translations.de: Ich schicke dir ein paar Fotos später.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈʃɪkə diːɐ aɪ̯n paːɐ̯ ˈfoːtoːs ˈʃpɛːtɐ/
translations.en: I’ll send you a few photos later.
translations.fr: Je t’enverrai quelques photos plus tard.
translations.it: Più tardi ti mando qualche foto.
translations.zh-Hans: 我稍后给你发几张照片。
translations.yue: 我稍後會傳幾張相畀你。
translations.ru: Я позже пришлю тебе несколько фотографий.
translations.he: אשלח לך כמה תמונות אחר כך.
translations.vi: Lát nữa tôi sẽ gửi cho bạn vài tấm ảnh.
translations.nl: Ik stuur je later een paar foto's.
translations.uk: Я пізніше надішлю тобі кілька фото.
translations.hi: मैं बाद में तुम्हें कुछ तस्वीरें भेजूँगा.
translations.el: Θα σου στείλω μερικές φωτογραφίες αργότερα.
translations.nb: Jeg sender deg noen bilder senere.
translations.id: Nanti aku kirim beberapa foto ke kamu.
translations.sv: Jag skickar några bilder till dig senare.
translations.ro: Îți trimit câteva poze mai târziu.
translations.da: Jeg sender dig nogle billeder senere.
translations.ja: 後で写真をいくつか送ります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite main verb, present indicative (1st sg); governs an indirect and a direct object.
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular dative; indirect object/recipient of the action.
Temporal adverb; modifies the verb to indicate a later time of sending.
Indefinite article; part of the quantifying determiner phrase ‘ein paar’ modifying ‘Fotos’.
Quantifying determiner; forms ‘ein paar’, modifying the plural noun.
Plural noun; accusative direct object of ‘schicke’ determined by ‘ein paar’.

sentences.target: Da liegen ein paar Bücher auf dem Tisch.
sentences.reading: /da ˈliːɡən aɪ̯n paːɐ̯ ˈbyːçɐ aʊ̯f deːm tɪʃ/

translations.de: Da liegen ein paar Bücher auf dem Tisch.
translations.ipa: /da ˈliːɡən aɪ̯n paːɐ̯ ˈbyːçɐ aʊ̯f deːm tɪʃ/
translations.en: There are a few books lying on the table.
translations.es: Hay algunos libros sobre la mesa.
translations.fr: Il y a quelques livres sur la table.
translations.it: Ci sono alcuni libri sul tavolo.
translations.ko: 탁자 위에 책이 몇 권 놓여 있어요.
translations.pt: Há alguns livros em cima da mesa.
translations.vi: Có vài cuốn sách nằm trên bàn.
translations.nl: Er liggen een paar boeken op tafel.
translations.hi: मेज पर कुछ किताबें पड़ी हैं.
translations.el: Υπάρχουν μερικά βιβλία πάνω στο τραπέζι.
translations.nb: Det ligger noen bøker på bordet.
translations.id: Ada beberapa buku di atas meja.
translations.sv: Det ligger några böcker på bordet.
translations.da: Der ligger nogle bøger på bordet.
translations.ja: 机の上に本が何冊か置いてある。

tokens.explanation: Locative adverb; sets the spatial context (‘there’).
Finite intransitive verb, present (3rd pl here); describes location/state; subject follows.
Indefinite article; part of the quantifying determiner phrase ‘ein paar’ modifying ‘Bücher’.
Quantifying determiner; forms ‘ein paar’, specifying an indefinite small number of books.
Plural noun; nominative subject of ‘liegen’.
Preposition; introduces a locative PP specifying placement; here with dative for static location.
Definite article, dative singular; determiner of ‘Tisch’ within the PP headed by ‘auf’.
Singular noun; object of the preposition ‘auf’, head of the locative PP.
